channel.title: Comments on: Episode 24 – Weyerbacher Winter Ale
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Edmond Medina
item.dc:creator: Edmond Medina
item.description: I liked John's comments about people not being afraid of dark beers. Especially if all they had to go on was Guinness. I was like that at one time. It wasn't until I tried an unreleased Baltic Porter from Sam Adams that I realized all dark beers were not like Guinness .
item.content:encoded: I liked John’s comments about people not being afraid of dark beers. Especially if all they had to go on was Guinness. I was like that at one time. It wasn’t until I tried an unreleased Baltic Porter from Sam Adams that I realized all dark beers were not like Guinness .
